chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: an individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: multiple addresses but only one primary per type

triplets.subject: Product
triplets.object: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchas... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who makes purchases and is identified by a unique Customer ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is an entry on a Sales Order that references exactly one Product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order line item representing a single product entry on a sales order, linking the order to a product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line in a Sales Order that specifies a product, quantity, and unit price for that line, identified by a unique line identifier.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Product Relationships**:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A self-referencing foreign key column in the TB_CATEGORY table that stores the ID of the parent category for hierarchical categorization.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a financial transaction record linked to a Sales Order, recording the amount and payment method, identified by a unique PAYMENT_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount | **Key Attributes**:
- Confirmation timestamp | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit card, PayPal, etc. | NO | | | AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO | | | CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Payment creation timestamp | NO | | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is the logistics entity that records items sent for a Sales Order, including what was shipped, when, and to whom.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Business Context**:
- Shipments represent the logistics side of order fulfillment. They track what items were sent, when, and to whom. | **Examples**:
- Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Customer Identifier
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric column that uniquely identifies a customer in the dataset.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: Historical unit price at the time of order (per unit), not the current price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal record of a customer's request to procure goods or services, used to track the order through fulfillment and history (sales/purchase order).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For
entities_post_resolution.definition: A data attribute that identifies the geographic region (tax jurisdiction) used to determine and calculate tax rules and amounts.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: 1Z999Aa1
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Examples**:
- Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Examples**:

entities_post_resolution.definition:

entities_post_resolution.definition: | AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO |

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core information about customers, including identifiers, contact details, regional assignment, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, SKU, product name, category, price, and whether the product is active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the categories and their hierarchical relationships for products or items, including each category's name and its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: This table stores the header information for sales orders, including identifiers, key dates, total amount, status, and timestamps for creation, payment confirmation, and delivery.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores detailed line items for each order, including the product, quantity, pricing, and line total.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments made for orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records for shipments associated with customer orders, including warehouse origin, shipment timestamp, tracking identifier, and current shipment status.
